'''鈭歜-h-ch-j''' ('''kabahchejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jayhawk|jayhawk]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-h-ch-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jayhawk|jayhawk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-h-ch-j
|-
! Lemma
| kabahchejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibahchejoko|thibahchejoko]] || [[word:jibahchejoko|jibahchejoko]] || [[word:shibahchejoko|shibahchejoko]] || [[word:kibahchejoko|kibahchejoko]]
|-
